creator: doconnor@gsoft.com.au
text:
On 27 Jan 2014, at 8:30, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of x11-toolkits/tix,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/186141 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/186141

I can't reproduce this on 10.0 or 8.4 (amd64 VMs just installed today from brand new ISOs).

I ran portsnap fetch && portsnap extract to get a ports tree.

--
Daniel O'Connor software and network engineer
for Genesis Software - http://www.gsoft.com.au
"The nice thing about standards is that there
are so many of them to choose from."
  -- Andrew Tanenbaum
